name: TuSimple Holdings Inc.
summary: PART I Overview of Our Company When used in this report, the terms TuSimple, Company, we, us, and our mean TuSimple Holdings Inc. and all subsidiaries. TuSimple is a global autonomous driving technology company headquartered in San Diego, California, with operations in the United States (U.S.) and Asia-Pacific region (APAC).
